About: It is about hospital casualty workers from Łódź responsible for murdering elderly patients and selling information about their deaths to funeral homes.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with funeral homes.
It is associated with hospital casualty workers.
It is associated with the Polish city of Łódź.
CausedBy: It is caused by hospital casualty workers.
ConsistsOf: It consists of the murder of elderly patients.
It consists of selling information regarding patient deaths to competing funeral homes.
CreatedBy: It was created by a newspaper article.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the murder of at least five elderly patients.
It is characterized by selling information regarding patient deaths to competing funeral homes.
It is characterized by bribes paid to killers.
It is characterized by the use of the muscle relaxant pancuronium.
It is characterized by the perpetrators being apprehended in 2002.
It is characterized by a newspaper article that brought the story to public attention.
It is characterized by a documentary film made in 2003.
It is characterized by a documentary film made in 2008.
It is characterized by inspiration for a novel.
Influenced: It influenced a film made in 2003.
It influenced a documentary made in 2008.
KnownAs: It is known as Łowcy skór.
KnownFor: It is known for murdering elderly patients.
It is known for selling information about patient deaths to funeral homes.
LocatedIn: It is located in the Polish city of Łódź.
OccurredAt: It occurred at a hospital casualty department in Łódź.
PerformedBy: It was performed by hospital casualty workers.
ProducedBy: It was produced by a Swedish company.
PublishedAs: It was published as Łowcy skór.
PublishedBy: It was published by Gazeta Wyborcza.
PublishedIn: It was published in the Polish newspaper Gazeta Wyborcza.
UsedFor: It is used for murdering patients.
It is used for selling information about patient deaths.
It is used for exacting bribes.
UsedTo: It is used to contact relatives before other funeral homes could.
WrittenBy: It was written by Tomasz Patora.
It was written by Marcin Stelmasiak.
It was written by Przemysław Witkowski.
WrittenIn: It was written in the Polish newspaper Gazeta Wyborcza.

About: それは、Łódźの病院の救急担当者が高齢患者を殺害し、その死に関する情報を葬儀業者に販売したことについてのメディアのニックネームです。
Affects: それは高齢患者に影響を与えます。
AssociatedWith: それは葬儀業者と関連があります。
それは病院の救急担当者と関連があります。
それはŁódźのポーランドの都市と関連があります。
BelongsTo: それはスキャンダルに属します。
CausedBy: それは病院の救急担当者によって引き起こされました。
ConsistsOf: それは高齢患者の殺害から成ります。
それは競合する葬儀業者への患者死亡に関する情報の販売から成ります。

HasFeatureOf: それは少なくとも5人の高齢患者の殺害を特徴としています。

それは2002年に逮捕された加害者たちを特徴としています。
それは物語を公衆の注意を引いた新聞記事を特徴としています。
それは2003年に作られた映画を特徴としています。
それは2008年に作られたドキュメンタリーを特徴としています。
